creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
I was trying to encode some files and all files (*.ts) was encoded without any errors!

Play encode file:
$ mpv vlc_record_1+1_160508.m4v 
Playing: vlc_record_1+1_160508.m4v
 (+) Video --vid=1 (*) (h264)
 (+) Audio --aid=1 --alang=und (*) (aac)
File tags:
 Title: vlc_record_1+1_160508
AO: [oss] 48000Hz stereo 2ch s32
VO: [opengl] 716x574 => 763x574 yuv420p
AV: 00:02:13 / 00:44:50 (4%) A-V: -0.000

<uname>
